title: Budgets, Interest, Loans, and Financial Decisions · Assumption Clinic
summary: Compare household plans, emergency savings, credit costs, and loan offers without hiding assumptions. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an explainable household decision model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify fixed, variable, periodic, and discretionary cash flows in a time-aligned budget.
Calculate simple interest and distinguish principal, rate, and time units.
Model compound growth by period and distinguish nominal from effective change.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Finance Risk evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Finance Risk assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Perform sensitivity checks on income, rate, and expense assumptions before recommending a plan. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Compare plausible approaches against the decision, constraints, evidence quality, and cost of being wrong.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: math beginner financial math. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Finance Risk, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to an explainable household decision model.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A financial forecast should present one certain future. This fails the Finance Risk contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: NIST SI Units and Metric Education (Current 2026 guidance) — Controls unit notation, dimensional reasoning, measurement, and estimation practice.

steps.title: Recalculate the repaired case
steps.instruction: $1100 grows once per year at 4.5% for 2 years. Calculate the compounded value.
steps.why: A numerical result is not complete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Use P(1 + r)^t with P=1100, r=0.045, and t=2.

content.title: Before calculating
content.text: Predict the sign and approximate magnitude. Enter the requested quantity with a unit, then compare it with that prediction.

hints: Use P(1 + r)^t with P=1100, r=0.045, and t=2.
Keep full working precision and round only the final reported value.
The accepted result is within 0.01 of the exact value and includes $ or dollars.

steps.title: Publish the incident record
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Finance Risk applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Perform sensitivity checks on income, rate, and expense assumptions before recommending a plan.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using perform and sensitivity plus specific case evidence.
